script: programmers call it beautiful. They always have

props.quote: Here's the thing about elegant code: programmers call it beautiful. They always have.

script: Poetry was already in the server room

props.headline: Poetry was already in the server room

script: Some weeks I build dashboards. Other weeks I write poems

lines: Other weeks I write poems nobody may read.

script: One used numbers. The other used metaphor. Tools different. Curiosity identical
the desire to understand what people actually feel beneath what they say

props.quote: The same thing drove both — the desire to understand what people actually feel beneath what they say.

script: The best commit messages have grief in them sometimes
